title: DraconicSpells
description: Adding spells based on the theme of ice and fire.
body:
[▮▮▮▮▮▮▯▯▯▯▯▯▯▯▯▯▯▯▯▯▯▯▯▯▯▯▯]<-(22%,6/27)
 

---------------✂---------------✂------------
 

Description

This mod adds new spells to Iron's Spells and Spellbooks, themed around Ice and Fire.

 

---------------✂---------------✂------------ 


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Spells

Fire Dragon---------------

The Fire Dragon School focuses on the Fire Dragon Heart from Ice and Fire.

- FireDragonCharge - Launches a fireball that causes an explosion and sets enemies on fire upon impact.
- FireDragon'sBlessing - Immune to freezing effects.
- FrameWingRend - Summons the wings of a fire dragon to slash foes with its claws.
--------------------------

Ice Dragon----------------

The Fire Dragon School focuses on the Ice Dragon Heart from Ice and Fire.

- IceDragonCharge - Launches a fireball that causes an explosion and sets enemies on fire upon impact.
- IceDragonsBlessing - Immune to burning and able to walk on lava.

---------------------------

</details>



---------------✂---------------✂------------
Planned Schools

・Lightning Dragon
・Ghost
・Titan
・Stymphalian Birds
・Sea Serpent
・Dreaded
・Villager

---------------✂---------------✂------------
